'''''Bespin''-class airhooks''' were small, one-person, high-altitude [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] used on [[Planet/Legends|planet]]s such as [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]. They were manufactured by [[Longspur and Alloi]], and inspired the [[Single Trooper Aerial Platform/Legends|Single Trooper Aerial Platform]] design.

{{Veh-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]''
*''[[The Bounty Hunters: Aurra Sing]]''
